verdict: SK-II's luxury essence combines 24K gold with proprietary Pitera™ yeast complex for prestige positioning and highest rating (4.5★). However, gold's skincare benefits are largely cosmetic; formulation justification relies on brand heritage rather than ingredient innovation.

_research.name: SK-II Facial Treatment Essence
_research.con: 24K gold provides minimal functional benefit; price premium heavily reflects branding over ingredient science.
